hooks.command: if [ -f .metis/agents.json ]; then echo '## METIS SWARM — Post-Compaction Recovery'; echo ''; echo 'You are running /swarm. Context was auto-compacted.'; echo 'Your loop state is preserved below. Continue the swarm loop:'; echo '1. Read .metis/agents.json for current agent state'; echo '2. Check running agents with TaskOutput(block=false)'; echo '3. Process completions, spawn new agents, continue the loop'; echo '4. Re-read the swarm SKILL.md if you need the full loop spec'; echo ''; echo '## Current agents.json'; cat .metis/agents.json; echo ''; echo '## Tasks in doing/'; ls .metis/tasks/doing/ 2>/dev/null || echo '(none)'; echo '## Tasks in todo/'; ls .metis/tasks/todo/ 2>/dev/null || echo '(none)'; fi
